title: Elf Door Kit, 1set
features: Package measures (L x W x H): 30.7 x 19.5 x 5 cm
Luxurious version of the Elven Door Kit with all the contents needed to create a mini world around the door, to create a fantasy area for children in December
Set of wooden objects to decorate and create this elven adventure - consists of a door to the secret world
description: A wonderful pre-Christmas trebd from Scandinavia with lovely details. Let the elf move in with you over the Advent season and build him a beautiful home with our elf set. A great joy for your little ones. In their magical world, an imp lives in their house. Unpack, set up & let's go! The set contains everything you need to get started!
